mapper.select: select p.id, p.name, p.price, p.original_price, p.brief, p.detail, p.stock, p.pic, p.pic2, p.hot, p.latest, p.category_id, c.name as category_name from product p left join category c on p.category_id = c.id where p.id = #{id}

select p.id, p.name, p.price, p.original_price, p.brief, p.detail, p.stock, p.pic, p.pic2, p.hot, p.latest, p.category_id, c.name as category_name from product p left join category c on p.category_id = c.id where p.category_id = #{categoryId}

select p.id, p.name, p.price, p.original_price, p.brief, p.detail, p.stock, p.pic, p.pic2, p.hot, p.latest, p.category_id, c.name as category_name from product p left join category c on p.category_id = c.id

select p.id, p.name, p.price, p.original_price, p.brief, p.detail, p.stock, p.pic, p.pic2, p.hot, p.latest, p.category_id, c.name as category_name from product p left join category c on p.category_id = c.id where p.hot = 1 limit #{n}

select p.id, p.name, p.price, p.original_price, p.brief, p.detail, p.stock, p.pic, p.pic2, p.hot, p.latest, p.category_id, c.name as category_name from product p left join category c on p.category_id = c.id where p.latest = 1 limit #{n}

select p.id, p.name, p.price, p.original_price, p.brief, p.detail, p.stock, p.pic, p.pic2, p.hot, p.latest, p.category_id, c.name as category_name from product p left join category c on p.category_id = c.id where 1=1
and p.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and p.brief like concat('%', #{brief}, '%')
and p.detail like concat('%', #{detail}, '%')
select count(*) from product where category_id = #{categoryId}
